title: Durch seine Venen fließt Blei
overview: The tragic death of a young lady causes a dramatic reunion of an old gunslinger, a prostitute and a suitor. Everyone bears a dark secret on his own and still they are tied to a joint fate. An emotional duel will decide about life and death of everyone...

trailers.title: Durch seine Venen fließt Blei (a.k.a. Bullet Vein)
